cases.closeout_read: Strong proof path: beat baseline on first-draft speed, final package speed, review loops, comment hygiene, and MEL rework.
Operationally strong donor path: first-draft target met, review noise reduced, and final package cycle materially improved.
Reached final package faster than baseline and cut review noise, but still trails UN/EU on first-draft speed and coordination discipline.

summary.comment_hygiene_read: All three donor paths reduced duplicate or conflicting comments versus earlier pilot stages; strongest hygiene gains are on UN and EU.
summary.mel_rework_read: Late MEL rework was reduced across all three cases and remained lowest on UN and EU.
summary.external_read: Pilot now supports an external proof point for NGOs with the caveat that USAID-scale workflows still require tighter coordination controls before broader rollout.
